_Sandbox_comment: Mode: "Host" runs bash directly on the host (default, backward compatible). "Docker" runs each bash command in a throwaway container with --network=none and a bind-mounted worktree; requires `./sandbox/build.sh` to be run once. Other fields only matter in Docker mode.
_MaxOutputTokens_comment: Per-provider override of the per-turn output ceiling. Optional; defaults to 16384 when unset. Cheap reasoning executors (codex-mini) want headroom for hidden CoT + a real write payload; premium models (Sonnet, Opus) want lower caps to bound cost.
_Research_comment: Per-run tool-call budget for `imp research`. Defaults to 60 when unset. Lower than build's 500 because research is read-heavy and converges fast — over-exploration is the failure mode.
_Wiki_comment: Settings for `imp wiki`. ToolBudget caps tool calls per per-directory survey run (tighter than Research because scope is bounded). MaxDirBytes is the static upstream gate: directories whose total in-scope source bytes exceed it get an oversized stub instead of a dispatched run, sized for a 32K-context executor with tool overhead and report output budgeted in. Dir is where pages are written (mirrored: src/Foo/ → imp-wiki/src/Foo.md). Default "imp-wiki" avoids collision with the C# Wiki/ source folder on case-insensitive filesystems. Provider names a ChatProvider entry used for orchestrator-role model calls (currently: repo-level README synthesis; later: adaptive splitting, drift triage). Falls back to ActiveProvider if unset. The named entry's Model field supplies the orchestrator model — no separate Model knob.

ChatProviders._comment: Qwen via any OpenAI-compatible endpoint. DashScope cloud shown; for Ollama use http://localhost:11434/v1 with any non-empty ApiKey, for self-hosted vLLM/sglang/llama-server use the deployment's /v1 base. NetworkTimeoutSeconds defaults to 600 — bump higher if you're on slow local inference (Vulkan/CPU) and seeing per-turn timeouts.
ChatProviders.Name: Qwen
